calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Termination Of Irrevocable Trsut Due To Changed Circumstances Not Known Or Anticipated By Trustors
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Roddick for and with Maria Carrasco.

The Court noted that all interested Beneficiaries agree to termination of the irrevocable trust, that the tax benefits are no longer there and that there is good cause to do it. The Petition for Termination of Irrevocable Trust is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Approving Termination Of Irrevocable Trsut Due To Changed Circumstances Not Known Or Anticipated By Trustors
Off Calendar Jun-19-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Termination Of Irrevocable Trsut Due To Changed Circumstances Not Known Or Anticipated By Trustors
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Continued To Jun-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Termination Of Irrevocable Trsut Due To Changed Circumstances Not Known Or Anticipated By Trustors
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Continued To Jun-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Termination Of Irrevocable Trsut Due To Changed Circumstances Not Known Or Anticipated By Trustors
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Continued To Apr-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Roddick for and with Maria Carrasco.

Mr. Roddick stated that no one has contacted him to oppose, that this was not done 22 years ago because his Client never came to him, and that the Children are now adults and one wants cash and the other shares in the property. Mr. Roddick also spoke of the difference in the property value, estate taxes and capital gains taxes. The Court stated that the order talks about creating a new trust, that it was not requested in the petition and that this may be problematic. Mr. Roddick stated that he agrees with the Probate Examiner's suggestion to go with modification. The Petition for Order Approving Termination of Irrevocable Trust, etc. is continued to April 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing and service of an amended petition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
